collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (7 total Queries, 7 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT `categories`.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE products.category_id = categories.id AND products.status = "active") as product_count FROM `categories` WHERE `categories`.`status` = 'active' ORDER BY `categories`.`name` ASC

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT `categories`.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE products.category_id = categories.id AND products.status = "active") as product_count FROM `categories` WHERE `categories`.`status` = 'active' ORDER BY `categories`.`name` ASC
